cases.title: In-window check-in stored with timestamp per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event is InProgress with check-in window active (current time between checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt)
Participant has registration in Registered state with no prior valid check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff or OrganizerAdmin actor with check-in capability for the event
steps: Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext) at a fixed in-window time
Query checkin_records and registration state for the participant
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 row satisfied: check-in is stored with non-null checkinAt ISO timestamp; registration transitions to CheckedIn; audit metadata (actor, method) persisted per BR-13

cases.title: Check-in module persists CheckinRecord and registration transition in one DB transaction
preconditions: Real database fixture with Registered participant and active check-in window
No existing CheckinRecord for the registration
Staff actor context with operatorId
steps: Execute staff check-in through check-in module/repository against real Postgres
Query checkin_records row and registrations.state in the same database session immediately after commit
cases.expected: Exactly one CheckinRecord row with checkinAt, method Staff, and operatorId; registration state is CheckedIn; no partial write (record without state change or vice versa) per module breakdown §4 transaction boundary

cases.title: Valid in-window check-in transitions registration Registered to CheckedIn
preconditions: Registration in Registered state before check-in
Event check-in window contains fixed clock now
No prior valid check-in on the registration
steps: Record beforeState as Registered from registration repository
Submit valid check-in via checkinService
Read afterState from registration repository and CheckinRecord
cases.expected: beforeState Registered, afterState CheckedIn per state machine §2; validCheckin guard satisfied (in-window, no duplicate); checkinAt timestamp recorded

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/checkins returns HTTP 200 with checkinAt timestamp
preconditions: E2E fixture event InProgress with active check-in window
Registered participant with valid registrationId
OrganizerStaff or OrganizerAdmin JWT scoped to the event
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } and Authorization bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance?page=1&pageSize=20 and locate the participant row
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt ISO timestamp, registrationState CheckedIn, participantId, and method Staff; attendance list includes the participant with matching checkinAt sorted by checkinAt:desc

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/self-checkin returns HTTP 200 with timestamp when self-service enabled
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with active check-in window
Authenticated participant JWT for a Registered registration with no prior check-in
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant Authorization bearer token and Idempotency-Key
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registration-status for the same participant
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt, registrationState CheckedIn, method Self; registration-status reflects CheckedIn with matching timestamp

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle check-in step records timestamp after registration
preconditions: E2E Flow A fixture: event progressed through publish, open-registration, and participant Registered
Event started (InProgress) with check-in window open
Participant token from prior registration step
steps: Execute Flow A check-in step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin or staff checkins for the registered participant
Verify response before proceeding to feedback step
cases.expected: Check-in response HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt and CheckedIn state, enabling subsequent feedback and eligibility steps in the lifecycle flow

cases.title: Participant self check-in UI shows success with recorded timestamp
preconditions: Event with self check-in enabled and window currently open
Participant logged in with Registered status for the event
Event in InProgress state allowing check-in
steps: Navigate to /events/{eventId}/check-in for the registered event
Trigger primary check-in action control
Observe success confirmation and check-in status display
cases.expected: UI shows check-in succeeded with visible timestamp or time-of-check-in indicator; registration status reflects checked-in state without requiring manual full page reload beyond normal client refresh

cases.title: Organizer staff check-in console records participant with timestamp
preconditions: OrganizerStaff logged in with assigned event scope
Event InProgress with open check-in window
Target participant appears in check-in list with Registered state and eligible for check-in
steps: Open organizer check-in operations console at /organizer/events/{eventId}/check-in
Identify registered participant and trigger staff check-in action
Verify row updates in paginated attendance list (default sort checkinAt:desc)
cases.expected: Console shows check-in success for the participant with recorded time and audit metadata (method, actor, timestamp) per BR-13; participant row reflects checked-in status immediately per UI state transition rules

cases.title: Participant denied staff check-in endpoint for another registration
preconditions: Event InProgress with active check-in window
Two distinct Registered participants A and B
Authenticated JWT for participant A only
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with participant A token and body { registrationId: B's registrationId }
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized; error envelope indicates insufficient check-in capability; no CheckinRecord created for participant B; registration B remains Registered

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied check-in on event outside assigned scope
preconditions: Event InProgress with active check-in window but not assigned to staff actor
Registered participant on that event
Authenticated OrganizerStaff JWT without scope for eventId
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with staff JWT and valid registrationId
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per scope policy; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration state unchanged

cases.title: Second check-in attempt returns CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED without altering timestamp
preconditions: Participant already has one valid check-in recorded within the window
Registration state is CheckedIn
Check-in window still open
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins (or self-checkin) for the same registrationId a second time
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance and count rows for the registration
cases.expected: HTTP 409 or 422 with error.code CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED; original checkinAt unchanged; attendance list contains exactly one check-in row for the registration

cases.title: Check-in at CheckinOpenAt boundary is recorded with timestamp
preconditions: Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinOpenAt
Registered participant with no prior check-in
steps: Submit staff or self check-in at the boundary instant checkinOpenAt
Query CheckinRecord and registration state
cases.expected: Check-in succeeds per window policy; checkinAt is persisted at or after checkinOpenAt and registration is CheckedIn

cases.title: Concurrent duplicate check-in requests yield at most one valid record with timestamp
preconditions: Registered participant with no prior check-in
Active check-in window
Two or more parallel check-in requests targeting the same registrationId
steps: Fire concurrent staffCheckin (or API POST) calls for the same registration
Count valid CheckinRecord rows and inspect registration state after all requests settle
cases.expected: Exactly one check-in succeeds with timestamp; other requests receive CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED or equivalent conflict; registration ends in CheckedIn with single valid check-in invariant (INV-04) preserved

cases.title: Check-in rejected when registration is not in Registered state
preconditions: Event with active check-in window
Registration in Waitlisted, CancelledByUser, or other non-checkinable state
Valid authenticated staff actor attempting check-in
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins for the ineligible registrationId
cases.expected: HTTP 409 or 422 with typed domain error; no CheckinRecord created; registration state unchanged

cases.title: Check-in page submit succeeds when UI gate shows check-in available
preconditions: Event InProgress with active check-in window
Participant logged in with Registered registration and no prior check-in
Self check-in page shows enabled primary check-in control (canSelfCheckIn true)
steps: Navigate to /events/{eventId}/check-in
Confirm UI gate permits check-in (button enabled, no window-closed blocker)
Trigger check-in via primary control
Observe network response and success UI
cases.expected: POST self-checkin returns HTTP 200; UI shows check-in success with timestamp; no mismatch where UI gate passes but API returns 404, 403, or CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; satisfies NFR-13 UI/API parity on critical check-in action
